content.full_text:
August 6, 2014

John Chen
12075 Saraglen Dr
Saratoga CA 95070

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-14-134

Dear Mr. Chen:

This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices Commission has withdrawn your July 21, 2014 request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act,1 as you requested in today’s email. Consequently, no response will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Zackery P. Morazzini
General Counsel

By: Valentina Joyce
Counsel, Legal Division

VI:jgl

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
